docs.title: Custom Calendar System
docs.description: Implement your own calendar system by creating a CalendarSystem adapter. This guide walks through creating an Ethiopian calendar system as an example.

docs.title: Performance Optimization
docs.description: react-native-fast-calendar is designed for high performance. This guide explains how to maintain optimal performance in your implementation.

docs.title: Testing
docs.description: Testing calendar components requires special consideration for date manipulation and user interactions.

docs.title: Calendar.DayCell
docs.description: `` is the default day cell implementation. It's a memoized component that renders a single day with selection, range, and today indicators.

docs.title: Calendar.DayGrid
docs.description: `` is the only built-in visual component that renders the 6×7 day grid. It handles layout, memoization, and swipe gestures.

docs.title: Calendar.Root
docs.description: `` is the headless provider that owns the calendar store. It renders no visible UI itself, but provides state to all child components via hooks.

docs.title: SimpleCalendar
docs.description: The SimpleCalendar component is a batteries-included calendar for the 80% use case. It wraps the headless API into one component with sensible defaults.

docs.title: Calendar Systems
docs.description: The library has zero calendar-system dependencies in the core. Everything is abstracted through the CalendarSystem interface.

docs.title: Headless Design
docs.description: The library is headless by design — it provides the logic and state management, but you control every pixel of the UI.

docs.title: Mental Model
docs.description: Understanding how react-native-fast-calendar works internally will help you build better calendar UIs and debug issues more effectively.

docs.title: Theming
docs.description: The library uses a small, opinionated set of theme tokens. Everything is overridable via props.

docs.title: useCalendarActions
docs.description: The useCalendarActions hook provides confirm and clear actions for the calendar, along with a canConfirm flag that indicates if the current selection is valid.

docs.title: useCalendarComponents
docs.description: The useCalendarComponents hook provides access to the custom component slots passed to `. Use it when building custom grids that should honor the same slot overrides as the built-in DayGrid`.

docs.title: useCalendarConfig
docs.description: The useCalendarConfig hook provides access to the complete configuration object passed to ``. This includes theme, labels, systems, and layout settings.

docs.title: useCalendarFirstDayOfWeek
docs.description: The useCalendarFirstDayOfWeek hook returns the active firstDayOfWeek value from ``. Use it when building custom grids to ensure column alignment.

docs.title: useCalendarHeader
docs.description: The useCalendarHeader hook is a convenience compound that combines month label, year label, and navigation into a single hook. It's useful for building standard calendar headers.

docs.title: useCalendarLabels
docs.description: The useCalendarLabels hook provides access to the merged labels object. Use it to display action buttons and accessibility labels in the correct language.

docs.title: useCalendarMonthLabel
docs.description: The useCalendarMonthLabel hook provides the displayed month's label and controls for toggling the month picker view.

docs.title: useCalendarMonthPicker
docs.description: The useCalendarMonthPicker hook provides data and actions for building a 12-cell month chooser grid.

docs.title: useCalendarNavigation
docs.description: The useCalendarNavigation hook provides goPrev and goNext functions for navigating through the calendar. It's view-aware and RTL-aware.

docs.title: useCalendarSelectedDates
docs.description: The useCalendarSelectedDates hook returns the array of selected dates in multiple mode. In single or range mode, it returns an empty array.

docs.title: useCalendarSelector
docs.description: The useCalendarSelector hook subscribes to a specific slice of calendar state. Components only re-render when that slice changes, enabling granular performance optimization.

docs.title: useCalendarStore
docs.description: The useCalendarStore hook provides direct access to the CalendarStore instance. Use it for imperative operations like selecting dates, clearing selection, or navigating months.

docs.title: useCalendarSystemSwitcher
docs.description: The useCalendarSystemSwitcher hook provides the list of configured calendar systems, the active system ID, and a function to switch between them.

docs.title: useCalendarTheme
docs.description: The useCalendarTheme hook provides access to the merged theme object. Use it to style custom components consistently with the calendar.

docs.title: useCalendarWeekNumbers
docs.description: The useCalendarWeekNumbers hook returns ISO 8601 week numbers for each row of the displayed month.

docs.title: useCalendarWeekdayLabels
docs.description: The useCalendarWeekdayLabels hook returns weekday labels rotated to match the active firstDayOfWeek.

docs.title: useCalendarYearLabel
docs.description: The useCalendarYearLabel hook provides the displayed year label and controls for toggling the year picker view.

docs.title: useCalendarYearPicker
docs.description: The useCalendarYearPicker hook provides data and actions for building a 12-cell paginated year chooser grid.

docs.title: Installation
docs.description: NPM/Yarn

docs.title: Introduction
docs.description: react-native-fast-calendar is a headless, high-performance calendar library for React Native. It provides the core logic for calendar functionality while giving you complete control over the UI.

docs.title: Bottom Sheet Date Picker
docs.description: A modal date picker using @gorhom/bottom-sheet.

docs.title: Bounded Selection
docs.description: Restrict date selection with minimum/maximum dates, disabled dates, and dynamic predicates.

docs.title: Custom Day Cell
docs.description: Customize the appearance of individual day cells for unique calendar designs.

docs.title: Date Range Picker
docs.description: Selecting a start and end date — common for hotel bookings, vacation rentals, and event planning.

docs.title: Flight Price Calendar
docs.description: A dark-themed, fare-aware date range picker — the kind of UI Skyscanner, Google Flights, and Kayak use to surface the cheapest departure / return combinations at a glance.

docs.title: Multi-Date Picker
docs.description: Selecting multiple individual dates — useful for booking multiple appointments, selecting event dates, or choosing available days.

docs.title: Multi-Month Grid
docs.description: Display multiple months side-by-side — useful for travel booking, seasonal planning, and date range selection.

docs.title: Single Date Picker
docs.description: The most basic calendar use case — selecting a single date.

docs.title: Vertical List
docs.description: An infinite scrolling vertical month list using @shopify/flash-list — similar to the iOS Calendar app.

docs.title: Week Numbers
docs.description: Display ISO 8601 week numbers alongside the calendar grid.

docs.title: Custom Calendar System
docs.description: You can implement any calendar system by creating a CalendarSystem adapter.

docs.title: Gregorian Calendar System
docs.description: The Gregorian calendar system is the default calendar system. It has zero dependencies and uses pure arithmetic for all calculations.

docs.title: Hijri Calendar System
docs.description: The Hijri (Islamic) calendar system. Requires @tabby_ai/hijri-converter or a compatible converter.

docs.title: Jalali (Persian) Calendar System
docs.description: The Jalali (Persian/Solar Hijri) calendar system. Requires moment-jalaali.

docs.title: CalendarComponents
docs.description: The CalendarComponents interface defines the component slots that can be customized via ``. Use these to replace visual atoms without building the full UI from scratch.

docs.title: CalendarMatcher
docs.description: The CalendarMatcher type defines how to match dates for disabling or modifiers. It supports three shapes: date arrays, range arrays, or predicate functions.

docs.title: CalendarModifiers
docs.description: The CalendarModifiers type is a map of named date matchers. Use it to mark dates with semantic meaning (booked, holiday, weekend) that can then be styled via DayCellInfo.modifiers.

docs.title: CalendarRootProps
docs.description: The CalendarRootProps interface defines all props accepted by ``.

docs.title: CalendarSelectionPayload
docs.description: The CalendarSelectionPayload interface is the object passed to onConfirm callbacks. It contains the selected date(s) as native JavaScript Date objects.

docs.title: CalendarSnapshot
docs.description: The CalendarSnapshot interface represents the complete state of the calendar at a point in time. It's returned by store.getSnapshot() and passed to useCalendarSelector callbacks.

docs.title: CalendarStore
docs.description: The CalendarStore class is the external store that manages all calendar state. It provides granular subscriptions and stable action methods.

docs.title: CalendarSystem
docs.description: The CalendarSystem interface is the core abstraction that enables multi-calendar support. Implement this interface to add support for any calendar system (Gregorian, Hijri, Chinese, Ethiopian, etc.).

docs.title: CalendarTheme
docs.description: The CalendarTheme interface defines all visual tokens used by the calendar. The library ships with default themes that you can customize via CalendarThemeOverride.

docs.title: DayCellInfo
docs.description: The DayCellInfo interface contains all metadata about a day cell. It's passed to custom renderDay functions and DayCell components.

docs.title: DayCellProps
docs.description: The DayCellProps interface defines all props accepted by the DayCell component.

docs.title: DayGridProps
docs.description: The DayGridProps interface defines all props accepted by ``.

docs.title: SimpleCalendarProps
docs.description: The SimpleCalendarProps interface defines all props accepted by the SimpleCalendar component.

docs.title: buildMonthGrid
docs.description: Builds a 6×7 grid of day cells for a given month.

docs.title: getYearPage
docs.description: Computes the 12-year page that contains a given year.

docs.title: isBetween
docs.description: Checks if a date falls between two endpoints (inclusive).

docs.title: isExplicitlyDisabled
docs.description: Checks if a date is disabled by explicit date lists or ranges.

docs.title: isoWeekNumber
docs.description: Computes the ISO 8601 week number for a native JavaScript Date.

docs.title: matchDate
docs.description: Resolves a CalendarMatcher against a single date.

docs.title: rotateWeekdayLabels
docs.description: Rotates a Sunday-first weekday array so the specified day is at index 0.

docs.title: usedRows
docs.description: Calculates how many rows in a month grid contain at least one day from the target month.
